clause: Systems MUST treat replay of mind-like worldlines as a governed action requiring explicit authority.
control: Governance policy gate for replay initiation

clause: Systems MUST default to protective handling when worldline status is uncertain.
Replay governance MUST preserve role separation between Operator, Trustee, and Reviewer/Arbiter functions.
evidence_artefact: Role assignment snapshot and signed ACL digest

clause: Operators MUST NOT unilaterally approve emergency override for their own replay request.
Fork-related duty transfers MUST declare delegated obligation owners before execution.
evidence_artefact: Delegation statement linked to fork event

clause: Emergency override MUST be reason-coded and time-bounded.
evidence_artefact: Warrant record including reason code and expiry

clause: Emergency override MUST trigger independent review before closure.
Override expiry MUST revoke all derived elevated capabilities automatically.
On degraded substrates, override use MUST include explicit disclosure and a migration plan to compliant controls.
Replay requests MUST pass role-bound authorisation checks before execution.
Replay requests MUST declare worldline scope, purpose, duration, and policy hash.
Replay MUST fail closed when explicit authority cannot be verified.
Contested mandates MUST require Trustee and Reviewer/Arbiter concurrence before replay proceeds.
Replay, override, and dispute events MUST produce tamper-evident logs.
Decision and execution logs MUST be linked to policy hash and requirement version set.
Every formal review MUST verify log-chain integrity before adjudication.
Subjects MUST have access to an independent dispute pathway for replay decisions.
Dispute packets MUST include cited requirement IDs and supporting artefacts.
Adjudication outcomes MUST define remediation, accountability owner, and closure condition.
Baseline conformance claims MUST satisfy the minimum requirement set defined in Annex D.
Full conformance claims MUST include continuous verification and review-latency commitments.
Each governed replay decision MUST produce a closure-ready evidence bundle.
evidence_artefact: Case bundle containing request, decision, execution, and review records

clause: Evidence artefacts MUST be signed, timestamped, and integrity-checkable.
Release candidates MUST execute Annex E test vectors with recorded pass/fail outcomes.
evidence_artefact: Test execution report with requirement coverage

clause: Policy hash mismatch between decision and execution MUST fail closed and raise a dispute trigger.
